SourceProxy.name: CurbDetectorOffline
SourceProxy.label: Curb Detector (offline)

Documentation.short_help: Detect curb steps via per-segment trajectory slicing and a lateral height profile.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Takes an aggregated point cloud and the trajectory used to generate it. For each consecutive trajectory segment, builds a slice plane perpendicular to the segment and a rectangular window. Projects in-window points to the slice frame, computes a lateral 1D height profile using order-median with light smoothing, and flags significant vertical steps (≥ ZChangeMin) as curb candidates.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Slice Half Thickness
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Slice Half-Thickness (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Half-thickness of the slice along plane normal.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Slice Left Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Left Distance (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum distance to the left of the trajectory to include in each slice (meters).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Slice Right Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Right Distance (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum distance to the right of the trajectory to include in each slice (meters).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Slice Downward Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Below Distance (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum vertical distance from the trajectory to include in each slice (meters).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Slice Upward Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Above Distance (m)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum vertical distance from the trajectory to include in each slice (meters).
